posts.author: kimmby (Carolina Valenzuela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’ve been trying to take full advantage of the Facebook Ads integration but when I try to use the integration for ad-sets that says “Every time period, sync each ad-set from account, to an item.”, it doesn’t update. Is this an integration that doesn’t work or am I just using it wrong? I selected import data on my profile picture uploaded all the accounts I needed, and it automatically applied the campaign integration. I then went one one of the accounts as a test and tried the Ad-Set integration like this:

image1089×725 42.7 KB
